description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed synthetic stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved box magazine, likely for intermediate cartridges, and a standard-length barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. The upper receiver has a mounted optical sight, possibly a red dot or compact scope, and backup iron sights are also present. The handguard is fitted with accessory rails and a vertical foregrip for improved control during rapid fire. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and reinforced polymer. The design is utilitarian, optimized for reliability and modularity in urban tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, vertical foregrip, optical sight, and detachable curved magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider, front sight post, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, optical sight, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and additional details of the handguard and sight.
